name: TD Bank
description_short: TD Bank is a full-service retail bank offering checking, savings, credit cards, mortgages, and business banking through physical branches and ATMs.
description_long: TD Bank is a major financial institution operating physical retail locations across the United States, including this Long Island City branch in Queens, New York. The company provides comprehensive banking services to personal, small business, and commercial customers through a network of branches and ATMs. This specific location offers traditional banking services during business hours (9 AM–6 PM weekdays, 9:30 AM–1 PM Saturday) with a 24/7 ATM for after-hours access. TD Bank distinguishes itself through specialized advisory services including mortgage lending, small business banking, merchant solutions, and wealth management offerings. The company emphasizes customer experience features like multilingual ATM support (12 languages), safe deposit boxes, notary services, and appointment-based consultations with specialists. Their product lineup includes credit cards with cash-back rewards (such as the TD Double Up card offering up to 2% cash back), student checking accounts with bonuses, and small business checking with fee waivers. TD Bank also highlights corporate social responsibility through partnerships (named Best Place to Work for LGBTQ Equality for 13 consecutive years) and accessibility initiatives like Aira technology for blind and low-vision customers. However, as a traditional bank, TD Bank operates within standard banking hours with limited weekend availability and no drive-thru service at this location, which may be inconvenient for some customers.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 24/7 ATM access with deposit capability and multilingual support in 12 languages
Multiple specialist advisors available on-site including mortgage loan officers, small business specialists, and merchant solutions advisors
Safe deposit boxes, notary services, and night depository box for business customers
Foreign currency exchange available (euros, British pounds, Canadian dollars)
Credit cards with up to 2% cash back rewards plus $150 signup bonuses
Small business checking with 3-month fee waiver for new accounts
Accessibility features including Aira technology for blind and low-vision customers
Student checking accounts with $100 bonus eligibility
cons: Limited branch hours (closed Sundays, only 9:30 AM–1 PM Saturday) with no drive-thru service at this location
No online appointment booking visible; requires calling (718) 786-4125 to schedule specialist consultations
Website navigation requires multiple clicks to access specific product information; some pages truncated or incomplete
best_for: Small business owners seeking local advisory support and merchant payment solutions
Customers needing multilingual banking services and foreign currency exchange
Mortgage seekers wanting in-person consultation with dedicated loan officers
Individuals seeking comprehensive banking with investment and wealth management options
diagnosis: TD Bank's Long Island City branch is best for small business owners, mortgage seekers, and individuals wanting comprehensive banking services with local specialist support and multilingual capabilities. The main caveat is limited weekend hours (closed Sunday, Saturday 9:30 AM–1 PM only) and no drive-thru service, which may require advance appointment scheduling during weekday business hours.
services: Credit cards including rewards cards and business cards
Small business checking and commercial banking
Merchant payment solutions (credit/debit card acceptance, contactless payments)
Safe deposit boxes and night depository
Foreign currency exchange (euros, pounds, Canadian dollars)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
